text.title: Cross-Tool PM Migration — Process Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the tool-migration-process methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: six_phase_order
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Phases must execute in order: Planning → Preparation → Pilot → Full Migration → Cutover → Stabilisation. Skipping Pilot is forbidden.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `six-phase-order` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: pilot_success_gate
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Full Migration must NOT start until Pilot cohort closes with count-check pass + sponsor sign-off.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `pilot-success-gate` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: rollback_30d_window
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Source tool must remain read-only for ≥30 days post-cutover; rollback procedure tested in Pilot.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `rollback-30d-window` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: comms_per_phase
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Each phase must have a comms artefact (email/announcement/training) sent before phase start.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `comms-per-phase` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: etl_checkpointed
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: ETL job must checkpoint per batch; failure of one batch must NOT corrupt prior batches.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `etl-checkpointed` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-tool-migration-process.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
